title: App Result
description: Worker output written to Public/USIdata/{dev_slug}/{inv_slug}/app_result_{id}.json. Written by bus.py (via scrapers) and csv_importer.py. All fields beyond the required base are source-specific. The raw_details field is present in scraper output but omitted by the CSV importer (raw data goes to rp_details.json / oto_details.json instead).

developer_slug.description: Developer directory name under Public/USIdata/ and Public/USI/.

investment_slug.description: Investment directory name. Stable identifier — does not change when portal IDs are reassigned.

usi_folder_path.description: Dropbox API path to the image folder, e.g. /Public/USI/{dev_slug}/{inv_slug}/. Used directly by the Coda pinemint-dropbox pack.

latitude.description: WGS-84 latitude. Null when not available from the portal.

longitude.description: WGS-84 longitude. Null when not available from the portal.

here_map_url.description: HERE Maps satellite image URL. Added by enrich_with_here_map() after scraping, when latitude and longitude are available.

image_paths.description: Dropbox API paths to downloaded images, e.g. /Public/USI/{dev}/{inv}/{file}. Used by DBGetSharedDropboxLink and DBUpdateImageThumbnail in Coda.

name.description: [rynekpierwotny] Investment name as returned by the RP API.

geo_point.description: [rynekpierwotny] [longitude, latitude] pair from RP API geo_point field.

construction_date_upper.description: [rynekpierwotny] Upper bound of completion date range (ISO 8601 date).

properties_count.description: [rynekpierwotny] Total number of units (apartments/houses) in the investment.

groups_id.description: [rynekpierwotny] Stage group IDs. Used by stage_detector.py to identify multi-stage investments.

stage_sort.description: [rynekpierwotny] Sort order of this stage within its group. Null when not part of a multi-stage group.

stage_is_current.description: [rynekpierwotny] Whether this is the currently active stage. Null when not part of a multi-stage group.

sibling_stages.description: [rynekpierwotny] List of sibling stage objects from the RP API groups endpoint.

sibling_stage_folders.description: [rynekpierwotny] Relative paths ({dev_slug}/{inv_slug}) of sibling stages. Used by Coda to link related investments.

url.description: [otodom] Canonical Otodom investment URL. The otoID embedded in the URL may change — USIfolder is the stable identifier.

title.description: [otodom] Investment title from the Otodom listing.

delivery_quarter.description: [otodom] Estimated delivery quarter (1–4). Null when not specified.

delivery_year.description: [otodom] Estimated delivery year. Null when not specified.

raw_details.description: Raw portal response — present in scraper output, absent in CSV importer output (raw data saved separately to rp_details.json / oto_details.json). The structure is portal-specific; see rp_details.schema.json and oto_details.schema.json.

error.description: Error message when scraping failed. The file is still written so Coda receives a response.

status.description: Processing status string (e.g. 'processing'). Set by bus.py before dispatching; typically overwritten by scraper result.
